contrastIssues: Original gold #AE9958 on pure black (#000) is fine (9.1:1) but on mid-gray #2A2D31 drops to 4.6:1 — passes AA body but tight for small muted text. Lifted gold slightly for consistent hierarchy across surfaces.
colorAudit.harmonyType: neutral-warm + neutral-cool — warm gold accent against cool gunmetal/near-black base. Single-accent palette, high restraint — correct for a combat-sport brand.
colorAudit.hierarchyStatus: strong — one electric warm accent, two tiers of cool neutral background, one light text tier. Clear primary-secondary-surface structure.
colorAudit.saturationNotes: Gold at ~42% saturation hits the 'antique brass' zone — premium, not cheap. Kept that note. Gunmetal at ~7% saturation reads as a cool-leaning gray, not plain black — preserves 'gunmetal' feel.

colorShifts: Lifted gold from #AE9958 → #B8A263 (+4 lightness, same warm brass family) to hit consistent 5.5:1+ contrast on both --bg and --bg-card
Shifted bg from #1A1C1F → #141618 (slightly cooler/deeper) to let the gunmetal mid-tone (#2A2D31) read as a distinct elevated surface
Added --bg-card (#1F2226) as a third neutral tier between bg and gunmetal — gives the design system proper surface hierarchy (bg → card → elevated)
Warmed text-primary from pure white to #F5F2EB (cream-tinted) so body copy picks up a trace of the gold's warmth — ties the palette together
Added #9BA0A6 as --text-muted (cool gray) for captions/metadata — matches the gunmetal temperature
accent-hover lightens to #D1B975 for interactive lift (dark-mode convention: hover gets brighter, not darker)

fontRecommendation.display: Archivo Black or Anton (condensed display sans-serif)
fontRecommendation.reasoning: Performance-Athletic style calls for athletic sportswear energy. Condensed black display sans for kinetic marquees and oversized headlines; Inter for body copy readability. The condensed display pairs cleanly with the gold accent without fighting it.
